message:
feat(cli,core): expanded robot output modes and configuration options

CLI lib:
- Extended CLI command routing with new subcommand handlers and improved
  argument validation. Added support for new robot output formats.

Robot module:
- Major expansion of robot (machine-readable) output capabilities with
  new report types, structured JSON output schemas, and configurable
  verbosity levels. Improved error reporting in robot mode with
  structured error codes and context.

Core config:
- Added new configuration options for tuning server behavior, including
  configurable timeouts, retry policies, and feature flags. Extended
  Config struct with additional fields while maintaining serde
  compatibility via defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
